synopsis: Fierce battles, exciting stories, and breathtaking animation raise the stakes higher than ever in Star Wars: The Clone Wars. The struggle of the Jedi heroes grows more complex as secret and forbidden relationships are revealed, lives are endangered, and a new breed of evil enters the war - merciless bounty hunters. From Executive Producer George Lucas and Lucasfilm Animation, Season Two promises thrilling new adventures, never-before-seen characters and creatures, and untold Star Wars stories.
title: The Clone Wars Season 2
